hooks.command: echo '---JOURNAL (ultimas entradas)---' && tail -30 JOURNAL.md 2>/dev/null && echo '---CHECKLIST (pendentes)---' && grep -n '\- \[ \]' CHECKLIST.md 2>/dev/null | head -5

TOOL=$(echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$TOOL" in Read|Glob|Grep|Bash) CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_HOOK_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('input',{}); print(p.get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in git\ status*|git\ log*|git\ diff*|git\ branch*|ls*|tree*|wc*) echo '{"decision":"allow"}';; *) ;; esac;; *) ;; esac

statusLine.command: BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo '?'); PENDING=$(grep -c '\- \[ \]' CHECKLIST.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); DONE=$(grep -c '\- \[x\]' CHECKLIST.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); LAST=$(grep '^## \[' JOURNAL.md 2>/dev/null | tail -1 | sed 's/## \[\(.*\)\].*/\1/' || echo '?'); echo "$BRANCH | checklist: $DONE done, $PENDING pending | journal: $LAST"
